Missing the requested caveat that analysis uses only the provided data/assumptions (e.g., sources, rounding rules)
Not showing the explicit calculation steps as requested (e.g., per-item computations, simple difference equations)
Using external or unprovided facts/conversion factors instead of strictly the given values
Presenting inconsistent or contradictory final answers
Exceeding the specified word or length limit
Failing to lead with a single clear, direct answer (burying or ambiguously stating the result)
Incomplete fulfillment of the task scope (e.g., ranking only a subset, omitting required elements)
Adding unnecessary or irrelevant qualitative commentary
Introducing inaccuracies via misleading comparisons or interpretations
Failing to explicitly name or identify the required subject (e.g., the specific city or country)
